messages.message: Choose a sponsor contract until the end of the season. You can negotiate offers, but the sponsor may withdraw if the risk becomes too high.
There is currently no company interested in sponsoring your team.
You may choose a new sponsor only after the %dth match day.
The selected sponsor does not want to collaborate any more. Probably another team was faster or the offer is no longer valid.
You still have a contract with a sponsor. This contract runs until the end of the season.
Congratulations, you have a new sponsor now!
High fixed income, but lower success bonuses.
Low fixed income, but high win and title bonuses.
Additional bonus based on stadium occupancy for home matches.
Stronger focus on cup matches and reached cup rounds.
The negotiation was successful. The offer was improved.
The sponsor withdrew. This offer is no longer available.
